recommendations.title: Tamako Love Story
recommendations.overview: Devoted to her family’s rice-cake–making business and the high school baton club, Tamako is a little slow when it comes to love. She’s oblivious to her childhood friend Mochizo’s affections, even though all their friends know. With graduation closing

recommendations.title: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel III. Spring Song
recommendations.overview: The battle rages on as Shirou continues to protect Sakura, now consumed by the darkness. He joins forces with Rin to end the Holy Grail War, while Illyasviel, who knows the truth behind it, confronts her fate. Amidst the chaos, Zouken plots to manipu

recommendations.title: Cardcaptor Sakura: The Sealed Card
recommendations.overview: All of the Clow Cards have been captured, and Sakura Kinomoto, the new Master of the Cards, is preparing to play the lead in the play for the town festival. However, a new evil force is causing mysterious events all over Tomoeda, including the disapp

recommendations.title: Dirty Girl
recommendations.overview: Accompanied by her closeted gay buddy, a promiscuous teenager sets out to find her long-absent father.

recommendations.title: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel II. Lost Butterfly
recommendations.overview: Shirou has lost his Servant, Saber, and is no longer a Master in the Holy Grail War. Despite this, he refuses to leave the battle, determined to protect Sakura. Meanwhile, a mysterious shadow engulfs the city, killing Masters and Servants one by one.

recommendations.title: Bitter Rice
recommendations.overview: Francesca and Walter are two-bit criminals in Northern Italy, and, in an effort to avoid the police, Francesca joins a group of women rice workers. She meets the voluptuous peasant rice worker, Silvana, and the soon-to-be-discharged soldier, Marco. W

recommendations.title: Mothering Sunday
recommendations.overview: On a warm spring day in 1924, house maid and foundling Jane Fairchild finds herself alone on Mother's Day. Her employers, Mr. and Mrs. Niven, are out and she has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover. Paul is the boy from the ma

recommendations.title: Secret of the Wings
recommendations.overview: Tinkerbell wanders into the forbidden Winter woods and meets Periwinkle. Together they learn the secret of their wings and try to unite the warm fairies and the winter fairies to help Pixie Hollow.

recommendations.title: Distracted
recommendations.overview: A comedy about an absent-minded man who works at a advertising company and topples from one problem to another.

recommendations.title: The Age of Adaline
recommendations.overview: After 29-year-old Adaline recovers from a nearly lethal accident, she inexplicably stops growing older. As the years stretch on and on, Adaline keeps her secret to herself  until she meets a man who changes her life.
